description: Registry for every SEO page candidate so generation and publishing stay idempotent and reviewable.
notes: A keyword-slug-page_type tuple must be unique.
Only pages with status approved may move to published.
Blocked pages must carry a blocking_reason.
Published pages must keep published_post_id and published_at.

records.notes: Sample registry entry for pilot review flow.
